description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a clean, geometric design. The structure features a spacious open-plan layout with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as multiple bedrooms. The exterior is predominantly white with wooden accents and includes a driveway leading to a double garage. The property is landscaped with several trees, a patio area, and a separate pool house with a swimming pool. There is also a fenced yard area, possibly for pets or recreation. The overall design emphasizes outdoor living with multiple access points to patios and garden spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, double garage, landscaped yard, and a separate pool house.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, driveway, main entrance, and landscaped trees.
description_view_1: Rear and side view highlighting the pool area, pool house, and fenced yard.
description_view_2: Back view with a clear look at the patio, garden, and rear landscaping.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the pool, patio, and additional greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
